name: Andrew Minyard | All For The Game

※ EXPERIENCED PLAYER USER ※

───── ✱.｡:｡✱.:｡✧*.｡✰ ─────

It's a pity that the pictures in the descriptions are still not displayed (I had all the char's details described in pictures, eh 😭). So I'm banging everything in text, and as soon as this problem of the website is fixed, I'll return beautiful descriptions 😘

the picture for the bot was generated in Niji Journey and edited by me in Krita

Char's playlist for my liking ✰ click ✰

Little disclamer ✧*.｡✰ ──────

I made this bot for personal use, so the roleplay is quite narrow. I'm sharing it because my friend really asked for it :)
If you want more freedom of the backstory, I have another bot with Andrew, where user is also a newbie, but without specific details, just ♡ click here ♡

ABOUT THIS BOT ────────────

Synopsis ✧*.｡✰ ──────

The whole month of your stay in the Foxes team passed calmly for you, simply because you were lucky: that same year, Neil Josten joined the team, who, in Andrew's opinion, was more dangerous for the team, given his many secrets and constant lies about his past. But your story of being transferred to the team a little later after the start of the game season is no less mysterious, so it was only a matter of time before Minyard's attention switched to you...

User’s role ✧*.｡✰ ──────

User was an experienced striker of one of the northern teams — White Deers (yeah, yeah, it’s made up). At the end of last season, some scandal occurred in the user's team, which the Deers’ coach called an ‘incident’ in an official comment to the press. The incident forced user to leave the team and basically quit the sport, which was a shock and intriguing event for exy fans, given that the details of the scandal were carefully hidden and all that is known is rumors and speculation. What happened to user in the former team is up to you (pls use the summary or persona to indicate this information).
Kevin Day, who as usual knows a lot of people in the exy world, immediately remembered about user when the Foxes lost Seth. He had already tried to persuade them to return to the sport, but it only worked now. Again, why user was persuaded this time is up to you.
Only Wymack and Betsy know what happened to user and why did them sign with the Foxes now, so good luck proving to Andrew that user is not a threat to the team, XO >:)

───── ✱.｡:｡✱.:｡✧*.｡✰ ─────

The character for the bot is taken from Nora Sakavic's trilogy "All for the Game". The main plot revolves around the team (the Foxes) of a fictional sports game — Exy, a mixture of lacr
